title: Future Tick Recalculation
description: Upon confirmation of changes to a historical Tick, the system shall recalculate the inheritance cascade for all subsequent Ticks, overwriting any conflicting future states with the newly applied changes.
acceptance_criteria: Changes made to Tick N automatically update the inherited state in Tick N+1, N+2, etc.
Conflicting state changes in later Ticks are overwritten by the cascading update.
